form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up settled well back; won by 1.1 len at Doomben Cl1 March 11 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Berezka carrying 56kg at $4.80. Second run from a spell got back early 7th of 12 at Doomben Cl3-Sw on March 28 over 1350m, 2.75 len behind Grammar Lad with 55kg at $6. Terrific chance to return to form in this far easier contest.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran on from midfield and won by 0.6 len at Eagle Farm Cl1 March 25 over 1400m defeating Duomo with 57.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len at Ipswich Mdn-Sw October 27 over 1350m in soft going defeating Meadowbrook with 58.5kg at $2.25. Building a nice record and can get the job done again.
